name: Amazon SG search and add to cart with price guard
description:
1. Launch browser.
2. Navigate to https://www.amazon.sg.
3. Wait for input[name="field-keywords"] to be visible.
4. Fill input[name="field-keywords"] with "Magic Tree House Boxed Set".
5. Press Enter key in input[name="field-keywords"] to submit the search.
6. Wait for search results to load and for the first product link (e.g., .s-search-results .s-result-item h2 a) to be visible.
7. Click on the first product link in the search results.
8. Wait for the product detail page to load and for the product title (id="productTitle") to be visible.
9. Read the text content of the product title element (id="productTitle").
10. Read the text content of the product price element (e.g., id="priceblock_ourprice" or id="priceblock_dealprice" or .a-price .a-offscreen).
11. Parse the price value as a number.
12. Validate that the price value is less than 25.
13. If validation passes, click the "Add to Cart" button (id="add-to-cart-button").
14. Wait for either a cart confirmation message (e.g., #huc-v2-order-row-confirm-text) to appear OR for the cart count element (id="nav-cart-count") to update and increase by 1.
15. Close the browser.
